nasb.text: therefore thus says the Lord God, “I will also stretch out My hand against Edom and cut off man and beast from it. And I will lay it waste; from Teman even to Dedan they will fall by the sword.

esv.text: therefore thus says the Lord God, I will stretch out my hand against Edom and cut off from it man and beast. And I will make it desolate; from Teman even to Dedan they shall fall by the sword.

cnv.text: 所以主耶和華這樣說：我必伸手攻擊以東，把人和牲畜都從其中剪除；我必使以東荒涼；從提幔直到底但，他們都要倒斃在刀下。

ccb.text: 所以，我要伸手攻击以东，铲除那里的人和牲畜，使地荒废，从提幔直到底但的以东人要倒在刀下。
